feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, Kyma runtime Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Use ServiceBinding data for APIRule jwt accessStrategies configuration
entry.content:
Hello Kyma Experts,

when using the helm charts generated by CAP there is a ServiceBinding to XSUAA which is used via a 

volume mount of the service binding secretName. I would like to use this secrets also in the APIRule for a jwt accessStrategies configuration. In https://github.com/gregorwolf/cap-azure-ad-b2c/blob/main/kyma/deployment.yaml#L49 I did this manually with a static configuration of the trusted_issuers and jwks_urls. But I want to get the configuration be flexible so I do not need to adjust it between dev / qa and production.
Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: How to call Webservice using Javascript of AppGiver (without destination)?
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Currently I have a OData Service which is working fine in Postman when tested.  Also I am able to call this service directly in Business Process Automation using JavaScript step without any destination.   

The input payload for execution is:

Payload Info:

var url = "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1" // a sample url 
{ method: 'GET', 
  url: url, 
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
}

And this work good & perfectly also.

Now I would like to call the same service using BTP Build App using JavaScript step.  I tried many ways.  But unlucky.

Can any one help me on this for the payload given able please?  

Thanks,

Ramani Nagarajan

entry.title: How to consume postgres hyperscaller(CF) from pods deployed in kyma
entry.content: Hi guys I have a postgres hyperscaller deployed on cloud foundry environment, how can I consume it from my pods in kyma environment? is it possible? or should I re-deploy the postgres hyperscaller from the kyma service instance. thanks!

entry.title: Issue regarding the missing home page for a specific persona in the SAP Service Asset Manager 2405
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager 2405 application within the S/4HANA(Version - 2022) and kyma environment. We can access the application through our credential but After the initial sync was successfully completed, we are encountering a missing home screen issue. We are unable to view the Home Page

I have attached the log screenshots for your reference

Could anyone please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?






SAP HANA service for SAP BTP , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One 
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: Not able to start this course , Start Mission button is not enabled
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to do this tutorial but it's not allowing me to start this course. 

the course link : https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-deploy-cap-kyma.html 

Any help is appreciated

entry.title: SAP BPA application shows Blank Page
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have successfully subscribed for SAP BPA and it got created as well & then completed the role assignment also. But while accessing the BPA application, it is showing blank page.

Could you please suggest how to fix this.

Many Thanks

entry.title: Will firewall affects while connecting to database table via SAP CPI ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am doing integration of databases from two different servers via Sap CPI , Will firewall affects SAP CPI to fetch database tables  while connecting to database table to fetch tables data from bussiness layer and send it to another database server. will sap cpi blocks data to fetch it from database due to firewall .

entry.title: BTP Build App
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need a control with a Dialog box for Opening Files and a Folder separately from the local systems, in BTP BUILD APPS.  Currently there is a function called PickFiles.  But it is not giving me the actual File path.

Can anyone guide me on this please?

Thanks,

Ramani Nagarajan

entry.title: shopping cart in MM for SAP Help
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How are you?

I have some questions about the shopping cart in MM for SAP, I need to know and information about shopping cart and what, where, How? ..... etc, for where is using the shopping cart in SAP and how to use this in any project.

And what is the benefit for shopping cart and what is the circle or workflow for the shopping cart for any project if you have any example?

If there anyone you can explain to me and if you have any website or photo to help me pls shared with me.

Thank you,

#ERP #MM #SAP #material_management #MM #cart #s4hana #sap #help #support #workflow

entry.title: Issue missing home page for a specific persona in the SAP2405 + missing some notes from 2405
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
@dudejas , @syam_yalamati 

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager 2405 application within the S/4HANA(Version - 2022) and kyma environment. We can access the application through our credential but After the initial sync was successfully completed, we are encountering a missing home screen issue. We are unable to view the Home Page.

However We tried implementing notes(3398187) into SSAM2405, but it is not relevant for our system and states that it cannot be implemented. This could be due to the status of our S4HANA 2022 system, as it has S4FND SP level 0000.

I have attached the log screenshots for your reference

Could please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?





Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  

@syam_yalamati , @dudejas

entry.title: 415 unsupported Mediatype issue in CAP
entry.content:
UI CODE :

 

 

_genericPostUploadFile: function (url, fileData, token, that, successCallback, errorCallback) {
					const formData = new FormData();
					formData.append('file', fileData);
					jQuery.ajax({
						type: "POST",
						url: url,
						processData: false,
                        contentType: false,
						data: formData,
						beforeSend: function (xhr) {
							xhr.setRequestHeader("X-CSRF-Token", token);
						},
						success: function (result) {
							if (successCallback) {
								successCallback(that, result);
							}

						},
						error: function (e) {
							if (errorCallback) {
								errorCallback(that, e);
							}
						}
					});
			

			},

 

 
 
CAP CODE :

 

    action uploadLogFilePr()   returns String;

excel.cds​

 

excel.js

 

 this.on('uploadLogFile', async (req) => {

        const { uploadLogFile } = require('./api/excel_v2/generalFunctionsExcelPr');


        let result;
        let file;
        let parameters = {};

        file = req.data
        parameters.FILENAME = req._queryOptions.FILENAME
        parameters.USER = req._queryOptions.USER
        parameters.DATE = req._queryOptions.UPLOAD_DATE
        parameters.TYPE = req._queryOptions.TYPE


        result = await uploadLogFile(file, parameters)

        return result

    })

 

error :

 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "415",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "Unsupported Media Type"
        },
        "severity": "error",
        "target": "/#TRANSIENT#",
        "innererror": {
            "errordetails": [
                {
                    "code": "415",
                    "message": {
                        "lang": "en",
                        "value": "Unsupported Media Type"
                    },
                    "severity": "error",
                    "target": "/#TRANSIENT#"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

 

i am getting file from UI5 in formdata, as binary but CAP is throwing 415 error (unsupported mediatype) how to fix this issues @gregorw @SAPSupport

I also used Multer but it didnt worked for me

entry.title: Missing "Record of Achievement" for the learning "Administrating SAP Business Technology Platform"!
entry.content: Missing "Record of Achievement" for the learning "Administrating SAP Business Technology Platform"!

entry.title: I was new to SAP BTP and wanted to learn kyma please invite me kyma slack channel
entry.content: Kyma slack channel invite needed

entry.title: The value 'null' cannot be set as 'From' address in the email.
entry.content:
Verify that the address has the correct syntax. Refer to the respective field of the destination sap_process_automation_mail.
Log ID:3d64d18c-09af-462f-80f0-2614fc6-us10

entry.title: Kyma Capacity Units Calculation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

i have a question regarding the Kyma Capacity Units. I need an estimate for the approximate costs for Kyma.

But unfortunately I don't understand the calculation of the Capacity Units.

What exactly is the "Time Consumption" metric ? 

Doesn't the runtime always run 720 hours a month because it's a cloud service?

Cant find anything in the Trial Account regaring pausing of runtime/nodes.

I am happy for any information or links regarding this topic 🙂

Regards

Simon

entry.title: Is there any way of creating dynamic AS2Filename taken from the CorrelationId? SAP PI/PO AS2 RCV
entry.content:
I've seen solved situations where the AS2 Filename is dynamically set and taken from the File name from SND channel.

I have a SOAP SND channel that is receiving an EDI file inside (as body message). Is there any way of creating AS2 dynamic file name in RCV channel and set it with CorrelationId or other data from the EDI message? We are using EDISeparator and it might be used to take other important info from the message and add them in concatentation with CorrelationId, to create the AS2 Filename.

Thanks in advance for all the answers!

entry.title: In Kyma Termination of Namespace got stuck
entry.content:
Hello,
I followed many blogs but couldn't find any solution to remove namesapce completely,

Tried deleting via kubectl and in kyma as well but no luck.
Can someone please help.

 

Regards

Pavan

entry.title: Exception :Job-30868 Error in [Services/RetailLabel/CORP/WebServices/Operations/PrintCDILabel/Interf
entry.content:
Exception :Job-30868 Error in [Services/RetailLabel/CORP/WebServices/Operations/PrintCDILabel/Interfaces/RestPrintCDILabel_1.0.process/Map Data]
Input data invalid
at com.tibco.pe.core.TaskImpl.eval(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.Job.a(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.Job.k(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.JobDispatcher$JobCourier.a(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.JobDispatcher$JobCourier.run(Unknown Source)
caused by: org.xml.sax.SAXException: validation error: data "" is not a valid dateTime.  A valid example is "1999-05-31T13:20:00-05:00".   ({com.tibco.xml.validation}SIMPLE_E_INVALID_VALUE_FOR_TYPE) at /{http://www.hermes.com/ESB/schemas/editing/cdilabel/v1}cdilabel[1]/{http://www.hermes.com/ESB/schemas/editing/cdilabel/v1}businessEnvelope[1]/{http://www.hermes.com/ESB/schemas/editing/cdilabel/v1}articles[1]/{http://www.hermes.com/ESB/schemas/editing/cdilabel/v1}article[1]/{http://www.hermes.com/ESB/schemas/editing/cdilabel/v1}expirationDate[1]
com.tibco.xml.validation.exception.ValueParseException: data "" is not a valid dateTime.  A valid example is "1999-05-31T13:20:00-05:00".
at com.tibco.xml.validation.state.glue.LegacySimpleValidator.string(LegacySimpleValidator.java:67)
at com.tibco.xml.validation.state.driver.ValidationJazz.d(ValidationJazz.java:1149)
at com.tibco.xml.validation.state.driver.ValidationJazz.endElement(ValidationJazz.java:498)
at com.tibco.xml.validation.state.glue.XmlContentValidationDriver.endElement(XmlContentValidationDriver.java:126)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.aD.a(XslConditioningFilter3.java:635)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.aD.endElement(XslConditioningFilter3.java:325)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.Q.execute(TmLiteralResultElementExpr.java:146)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.L.execute(TmIfExpr.java:115)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.aF.execute(XslContentExpr.java:136)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.Q.execute(TmLiteralResultElementExpr.java:141)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.C.execute(TmForEachExpr.java:158)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.Q.execute(TmLiteralResultElementExpr.java:141)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.Q.execute(TmLiteralResultElementExpr.java:141)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.aF.execute(XslContentExpr.java:136)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.Q.execute(TmLiteralResultElementExpr.java:141)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.f.a(DefaultTemplateExpr.java:143)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.e.a(DefaultModuleTransformExpr.java:289)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.impl.expr.e.a(DefaultModuleTransformExpr.java:173)
at com.tibco.xml.transform.trax.h.transform(TmTransformerImpl.java:318)
at com.tibco.xml.xdata.bind.OnceOnlyBinding.stream(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.xml.xdata.bind.OnceOnlyBinding.getXiNode(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.plugin.Activity.eval(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.TaskImpl.eval(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.Job.a(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.Job.k(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.JobDispatcher$JobCourier.a(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.JobDispatcher$JobCourier.run(Unknown Source)
 
at com.tibco.xml.xdata.bind.BindingRemarkHandler.assertNoErrors(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.xml.xdata.bind.OnceOnlyBinding.assertNoErrors(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.TaskImpl.eval(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.Job.a(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.Job.k(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.JobDispatcher$JobCourier.a(Unknown Source)
at com.tibco.pe.core.JobDispatcher$JobCourier.run(Unknown Source)
Input data invalidcom.tibco.pe.core.BindExceptionBindExceptionServices/RestInterface/CORP/WebServices/Interfaces/Editing-Rest_01.00.process/Operation Dispatcher>Services/RetailLabel/CORP/WebServices/Operations/PrintCDILabel/Interfaces/RestPrintCDILabel_1.0.process/Map DataBWENGINE-100030

entry.title: Regarding NS plugins to generate QR for (SSAMClient+Standard) with platform independent(IOS+Android)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are using Native Script plugins ("nativescript-printer" & "nativescript-qr-generator") to generate QR code in the SAP SSAM2310 Client application. To achieve this, we created a branded SSAM 2310 client using these plugins, following the instructions from the referenced link(Use NativeScript plugins to Generate QR Code and Printing in MDK app ). It is currently working fine with the SSAM2310 branded client only.

Is there any possibility of using native script plugins or an alternative way to generate QR codes that would be accessible for all types of applications, including both SSAM custom clients and the standard SSAM application? It should also be platform independent.

I have attached the log screenshots for your reference

Could you please provide some insights or suggestions to achieve this requirement?




SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  

Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

entry.title: 403 Forbidden error while posting
entry.content:
Whenever i tries to send data from postman to CPI Iflow. It always give me error 403 Forbidden. 

I found this youtube video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s6f_ettin5Y it use simple iflow. I tried it still getting same error ??? help me to encounter this.

This is my IFlow very basic. 

 

 

and this is postman error

I am using basic credential of my service instance.
